value_metric: A0 2016+ Wave 2 expands the SCALE-approved cohort beyond Wave 1 only after the Wave 1 value-cost gate passed: 11 real A0 originals from gov-cn-fagui and stats-gov across 6 months, through the same content-addressed identity/version pipeline with no quality regression, unit cost in the approved range (dev-env, 0 cloud), and failed/partial sources isolated -- so central coverage grows without regression or cost blowup

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: Wave-2 backfill from the dev environment (real gov.cn/fagui + stats.gov.cn fetches); production worker/cron NOT touched -> 0 cloud cost, DIR-007 unaffected; full 2016+ accrues over real time once wired to the worker
